title: gomphandra capitulata
intro: Gomphandra capitulata, also known as the small-flowered gomphandra or small-flowered helmet oak, is a species of flowering plant in the family Stemonuraceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and pneumonia, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Gomphandra capitulata include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and aiding in the relief of coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Gomphandra capitulata is often used as a decoction or infusion, and its roots are commonly used in traditional medicine to create remedies for various health conditions.
